series_metadata.series_description: Includes internal correspondence (letters, memos); also, correspondence from various individuals, companies, and organizations requesting information pertaining to agency and legal interpretations adn other miscellaneous inquiries. This correspondence is informative (it does not attempt to influence agency policy).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: If correspondence documents or relates a specific construction project, it shall be kept as set forth in GAR-C-03(A)
